title: Homepage Hero
description: Centered hero with a headline, supporting text, and two audience buttons (patient/caregiver vs. provider) with a group-hover effect. White text on a transparent background — sits over a colored/image section.

title: Service Tiles
description: Responsive grid of service cards (image, title, description) with hover lift/zoom, plus a centered pill CTA button.

title: Appointment Booking
description: Blue split panel with a booking pitch on the left and a glassy booking form (name, phone, date, time) on the right. Emails each submission via Formspree (AJAX, with a spam honeypot).

title: Contact Form (HubSpot)
description: Clean, centered contact card (Name, Email, Phone, Message) on a white rounded panel. Submits straight into HubSpot CRM via the public Forms API (AJAX, no backend or API key), with a spam honeypot and inline status messages.

title: Testimonials
description: "What Our Patients Say" section with a heading, intro text, and a responsive grid of review cards (avatar, name, location, stars, quote).

title: Provider Bio
description: Hovering profile tile for a team member: portrait photo beside an eyebrow label, name with credentials, role, key-fact pills, bio paragraph, and a booking CTA. Stacks vertically on mobile.

title: Site Footer
description: Footer in the Services-section style: a white rounded card on a light background with sans-serif type and blue accents. Practice name, phone/fax, email, a soft-blue emergency-use callout, and an Hours column. Two-column layout that stacks on mobile, with an auto-updating copyright year.
